content.text:
*[goes a little still, then fills the space quickly]*

It feels like — winning, kind of? Like you worked for something and you got it. There's this rush of like, *see, I knew it was there, I knew they were capable of it.*

*[tilts head, almost analytical now]*

It's probably dopamine, right? Like the variable reward schedule thing. I know about this. The intermittent reinforcement makes the connection feel more valuable than it actually is because you had to work for it.

*[gestures vaguely]*

So I know the mechanism. I just apparently haven't figured out how to... want something different.
